name: omazifier-demo
description: Demo harness for the omazifier engine: mock BFF, mobile app, and web app per market.

scripts.dev:web:uk: MARKET=uk PORT=3005 npm --workspace mock-web-monorepo run dev
scripts.dev:web:de: MARKET=de PORT=3006 npm --workspace mock-web-monorepo run dev
scripts.dev:web:fr: MARKET=fr PORT=3007 npm --workspace mock-web-monorepo run dev
